rows.source_ref: Trading System Educational Books, thread started by Pauley1, BabyPips Forums, 2023, https://forums.babypips.com/t/trading-system-educational-books/1130926
rows.concept: Thread contains only recommendations of trading books; no mechanical strategy rules are stated.
rows.eligibility_reason: No usable edge; thread is purely a list of book titles (Davey, Lien, Elder, Weissman, Pardo, Kaufman) with no entry/exit/parameter rules to implement.
rows.notes: 16-post BabyPips thread. Books mentioned: 'Entry and Exit Confessions of a Champion Trader' & 'Building Winning Algorithmic Trading Systems' (Kevin J. Davey), 'The Little Book of Currency Trading' (Kathy Lien), 'Trading for a Living' (Alexander Elder), 'Mechanical Trading Systems' (Weissman), 'The Evaluation and Optimization of Trading Strategies' (Pardo), 'Trading Systems and Methods' (Kaufman). These are secondary book pointers only, no rules.

notes: book-recommendation thread; no mechanical strategy rules present
